prompt:
[Person] Refer to image 1

[Pose and Expression]
A person laughing brightly with eyes closed in an outdoor garden. They have their right arm raised, holding a plumeria flower with a mix of white and yellow near their right eye. The overall pose has a lovely, lively, and free-spirited tension.

[Clothing]
Wearing a yellow one-piece swimsuit with thin straps, featuring a subtle embossed Chanel logo pattern on the surface. They are also wearing a colorful beaded floral necklace and several pink and white voluminous scrunchies layered on the right wrist as a cute accent.

[Hairstyle and Makeup Details]
A natural high bun styled at the crown of the head, decorated with plumeria flowers. The makeup is fresh, with transparent and clear skin expression showing fine peach fuzz, enhanced with pink blush on both cheeks for vitality.

[Lighting and Direction]
Intense, vivid direct natural sunlight from a clear day is illuminating the front of the subject. The strong sunlight makes the person's skin and the yellow of the swimsuit glow brightly, while deep, sharp shadows under the nose, chin, and inside the arms provide a strong sense of three-dimensionality and midsummer heat.

[Texture and Color Mood]
A retro and analog mood as if taken with a vintage film camera. The vivid yellow swimsuit and flower colors create a strong contrast with the dark green plants in the background, evoking a refreshing and happy midsummer vacation atmosphere.

[Film and Camera Depth/Angle]
Shot from a front eye-level angle. It has the feel of direct sunlight as if a flash was used, with the subject in sharp focus overall. A rough grain texture characteristic of analog film photography covers the entire image, adding vintage nostalgia.

[Background Elements (Optional)]
Behind the person is a bright outdoor garden landscape with lush dark green shrubs and trees. In the lower-left corner, part of the backrest of a bright yellow outdoor metal chair is visible, and the strong light falling on the leaves completes the unique liveliness of a summer day.

[Signature] A small Meta Threads logo is located in the lower right, with "CHAse" written in white cursive script like a small signature above it.
